title: Validate IPv6 and UDP length fields before SCHC compression
description: Trigger: lichen_schc_compress() receives malformed IPv6/UDP input where the IPv6 Payload Length or UDP Length field disagrees with pkt_len. lichen/subsys/lichen/schc/schc.c compresses based on caller length around the UDP rule matching path near line 481 and later decompression normalizes lengths/checksums. Impact: malformed or truncated packets can round-trip into different, apparently valid packets, hiding upstream parser bugs and confusing interoperability tests. Validate IPv6 payload length and UDP length against pkt_len before applying SCHC rules.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
